Welcome to UTA MACS
Urban Trilla Apartment Owners Mutually Aided Cooperative Maintenance Society Limited

Building a stronger community together in Kondakal, Shankarpalle, Ranga Reddy District, Telangana. We are committed to providing exceptional maintenance services and fostering community engagement for all residents.

Learn More About Us Join Our Community

Our Community Impact

Numbers that reflect our commitment to building a better community for everyone.

Active Members

Events Organized
200+
Families Served

About UTA MACS

Urban Trilla Apartment Owners Mutually Aided Cooperative Maintenance Society Limited is dedicated to serving the residents of our community with excellence and integrity. We believe in the power of collective action to create sustainable, thriving neighborhoods.

Transparent governance and decision-making
Exceptional maintenance and facility management
Community engagement and resident participation
Learn More About Us

Our Mission

To create a model residential community where residents collaborate for mutual benefit, sustainable development, and shared prosperity in Kondakal, Telangana.

What We Offer

Comprehensive services designed to enhance your living experience and build community connections.

Maintenance Services

Professional maintenance and repair services for common areas, facilities, and infrastructure.

Request Service →

Community Management

Dedicated committee working to ensure transparent governance and resident satisfaction.

Meet Our Team →

Notices & Updates

Stay informed with the latest announcements, meeting schedules, and community news.

View Notices →

Join community events, cultural celebrations, and social gatherings that bring us together.

Download Files →

Access Portal →

What Our Residents Say

Hear from members of our community about their experience living at UTA MACS.

RK

Rajesh Kumar

Resident since 2025

"UTA MACS has transformed our community. The maintenance services are excellent, and the committee is always responsive to resident needs."

PS

Priya Sharma

Resident since 2024

"The community events organized by UTA MACS bring everyone together. It's wonderful to see how connected our neighborhood has become."

AM

Arun Mehta

Resident since 2026

"Transparent governance and regular communication make UTA MACS stand out. I feel confident that our voices are heard."

Ready to Join Our Community?

Become a part of UTA MACS and contribute to building a better tomorrow for our neighborhood.

Contact Us Today Member Login

About UTA MACS

Urban Trilla Apartment Owners Mutually Aided Cooperative Maintenance Society Limited represents residents of Urban Trilla Apartments, fostering community welfare and cooperative governance.

Our Vision

To create a harmonious and sustainable community where residents work together for mutual benefit and shared prosperity.

Our Mission

Provide excellent maintenance services, promote community engagement, and ensure transparent governance for all residents.

What Our Members Say

Hear from our valued community members

Rajesh Kumar
Resident

"The association has greatly improved our community's quality of life. Maintenance issues are resolved quickly and communication is excellent."

Priya Sharma
Committee Member

"Being part of this association has been rewarding. We've built a strong community spirit and achieved so much together."

Amit Patel
Resident

"The events organized by the association bring everyone together. It's wonderful to see our community thriving."
